sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4689" key="a(lthri/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁλ-τηρία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n4689.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">use of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἁλτῆρες,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0135.tlg001:1:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artemid.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.57</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
